name: CancelContractCancellation
description: Customer has an active cancellation on their account and wants to reverse it, withdraw it, or stop it from going ahead — they have changed their mind about leaving and want to stay with Virgin Media.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I want to cancel my cancellation
Can I undo my cancellation?
I've changed my mind about cancelling
Please stop my cancellation from going through
I don't want to cancel anymore — I want to stay
How do I reverse my cancellation?
I want to withdraw my cancellation request
There's a cancellation on my account but I've changed my mind
I put in a cancellation but I want to take it back
Can you remove the cancellation from my account?
I've reconsidered — please keep my account active
I was going to leave but I've decided to stay
My cancellation is still pending — can you stop it?
I regret cancelling — can I get my services back?
Don't go ahead with cancelling my account
I've had a change of heart about leaving
The cancellation on my account needs to be removed
I called to cancel before but I want to stay now
Is it too late to stop my cancellation?
undo my cancellation
